title: carex × payettei
intro: Carex × payettei, also known as Payette's sedge, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Carex and Carex douglasii plant families. Traditionally, Carex × payettei has been used in herbal medicine, primarily for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Carex × payettei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
